languages.text: {n}Блюстители шагают вперед, отгораживая шествие от вашего трона. Не прекращая прославлять вас выкриками и молитвами, процессия разворачивается и следует к выходу с палубы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Блюстители шагают вперед, отгораживая шествие от вашего трона. Не прекращая прославлять вас выкриками и молитвами, процессия разворачивается и следует к выходу с палубы.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Блюстители шагают вперед, отгораживая шествие от вашего трона. Не прекращая прославлять вас выкриками и молитвами, процессия разворачивается и следует к выходу с палубы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}
{n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}
{n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エンフォーサーたちが前に出て、あなたの王座から続く行列を遮る。彼らの叫びや賛美の祈りは途切れることなく、行列は回り込み、甲板を去ろうとする。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İnfazcılar, öne çıkarak kafilenin tahtına yaklaşmasını engelliyor. Kafile, övgü dolu haykırışlarını ve dualarını kesmeden arkasını dönüp güverteyi terk etmek üzere harekete geçiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İnfazcılar, öne çıkarak kafilenin tahtına yaklaşmasını engelliyor. Kafile, övgü dolu haykırışlarını ve dualarını kesmeden arkasını dönüp güverteyi terk etmek üzere harekete geçiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}执法者上前，将队伍阻挡在你的宝座前。在转身退离甲板的过程中，人群也没有停止欢呼与祝颂。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}执法者上前，将队伍阻挡在你的宝座前。在转身退离甲板的过程中，人群也没有停止欢呼与祝颂。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Enforcer treten vor und stellen sich zwischen die Prozession und deinen Thron. Ohne ihre Lobpreisungen und Gebete einzustellen, macht die Prozession daraufhin kehrt, um das Deck zu verlassen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Enforcer treten vor und stellen sich zwischen die Prozession und deinen Thron. Ohne ihre Lobpreisungen und Gebete einzustellen, macht die Prozession daraufhin kehrt, um das Deck zu verlassen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les prévôts avancent de manière à s'interposer entre la procession et votre trône. Sans cesser de crier et de chanter vos louanges, la foule fait volte-face avant d'évacuer le pont.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les prévôts avancent de manière à s'interposer entre la procession et votre trône. Sans cesser de crier et de chanter vos louanges, la foule fait volte-face avant d'évacuer le pont.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El personal de seguridad se adelanta, impidiendo que la procesión acceda a tu trono. Sin dejar de entonar vítores y plegarias en tu honor, el grupo da media vuelta y abandona la cubierta.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enforcers step forward, blocking the procession from your throne. Without interrupting their shouts and prayers of praise, the procession turns around and moves to leave the deck.{/n}
